### Assistant *(2026-02-25T17:15:52.728Z)*

**Tool call:** `Write`
```json
{
  "file_path": "/Users/mta/Documents/claude/mocho/docs/frbr-fabio-nonwemi-rda-mapping.md",
  "content": "# FRBR Core and FaBiO Non-WEMI → RDA Mapping\n\n## Scope\n\nMaps FRBR Core (`http://purl.org/vocab/frbr/core#`) and FaBiO (`http://purl.org/spar/fabio/`)\nclasses and properties that are **not** Work / Expression / Manifestation / Item (WEMI)\nentities. The non-WEMI layer corresponds to EDM's `edm:Agent`, `edm:Place`, and\n`edm:TimeSpan` roles:\n\n- **Group 2** — responsible entities: `frbr:Person`, `frbr:CorporateBody`\n- **Group 3** — subjects: `frbr:Concept`, `frbr:Event`, `frbr:Object`, `frbr:Place`\n- **Linking properties** — properties connecting WEMI entities to Group 2/3 entities\n- **FaBiO-specific** — `fabio:SubjectDiscipline`, `fabio:SubjectTerm`,\n  `fabio:StorageMedium`, and their associated properties\n\nRDA classes use the `rdac:` prefix (`https://rdaregistry.info/Elements/c/`).\nRDA Agent properties use `rdaa:` (`https://rdaregistry.info/Elements/a/`).\nRDA W/E/M/I properties use `rdaw:/rdae:/rdam:/rdai:` as usual.\n\n---\n\n## 1. Class Mappings\n\n### 1.1 FRBR Core — Group 2: Responsible Entities (Agent-like)\n\n| FRBR Class | Label | RDA Class | Label | Match |\n|---|---|---|---|---|\n| `frbr:ResponsibleEntity` | responsible entity | `rdac:C10002` | Agent | direct |\n| `frbr:Person` | person | `rdac:C10004` | Person | direct |\n| `frbr:CorporateBody` | corporate body | `rdac:C10005` | Corporate Body | direct |\n\n**Notes:**\n- `frbr:ResponsibleEntity` is a superclass of both `frbr:Person` and `frbr:CorporateBody`.\n  `rdac:C10002` Agent plays the same role in RDA, also subsumes Person\n  (`rdac:C10004`) and Corporate Body (`rdac:C10005`).\n- RDA additionally defines `rdac:C10008` Family and `rdac:C10011` Collective Agent,\n  which have no FRBR equivalents.\n\n### 1.2 FRBR Core — Group 3: Subjects\n\n| FRBR Class | Label | RDA Class | Label | Match |\n|---|---|---|---|---|\n| `frbr:Subject` | subject | — | — | no match |\n| `frbr:Concept` | concept | — | — | no match |\n| `frbr:Event` | event | — | — | no match |\n| `frbr:Object` | object | — | — | no match |\n| `frbr:Place` | place | `rdac:C10009` | Place | direct |\n\n**Notes:**\n- RDA has no generic `Subject` superclass. Subjects are expressed through\n  type-specific properties (`rdaw:P10256` subject agent, `rdaw:P10100`\n  subject place, etc.) rather than a class hierarchy.\n- `frbr:Concept` — RDA externalises concept subjects to SKOS vocabularies;\n  no RDA concept class.\n- `frbr:Event` — RDA has `rdac:C10010` Timespan (\"a finite period of time\")\n  but this is a duration, not an event. No direct match.\n- `frbr:Object` — No RDA equivalent.\n- `frbr:Place` → `rdac:C10009` (\"a given extent of space\") is a direct match.\n\n### 1.3 FaBiO Non-WEMI Classes\n\n| FaBiO Class | Label | RDA Class | Label | Match |\n|---|---|---|---|---|\n| `fabio:SubjectDiscipline` | subject discipline | — | — | no match |\n| `fabio:SubjectTerm` | subject term | — | — | no match |\n| `fabio:StorageMedium` | storage medium | — | — | no match |\n\n**Notes:**\n- `fabio:SubjectDiscipline` — the intellectual field or domain (e.g. biology,\n  linguistics). RDA describes subjects through controlled-vocabulary terms\n  with no corresponding class.\n- `fabio:SubjectTerm` — a controlled-vocabulary entry. RDA uses `skos:Concept`\n  (external) in equivalent roles; no RDA class for vocabulary terms.\n- `fabio:StorageMedium` — the physical carrier upon which a `fabio:Item` is\n  stored. RDA describes carrier characteristics through Manifestation\n  properties (carrier type, media type, base material), not through a\n  separate StorageMedium class.\n\n---\n\n## 2. Property Mappings\n\n### 2.1 FRBR Core — Agent-Role Properties\n\nThese properties connect WEMI entities to `frbr:ResponsibleEntity` instances.\nRDA replaces the single generic responsible-entity property with a set of\nrole-specific and entity-level-specific properties.\n\n#### 2.1.1 Generic responsible-entity properties\n\n| Property | Label | Domain | Range | RDA Property | RDA Label | Match |\n|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|\n| `frbr:responsibleEntity` | has responsible entity | Endeavour | ResponsibleEntity | `rdaw:P10065`; `rdae:P20053`; `rdam:P30329`; `rdai:P40021` | (role-specific set) | approximate |\n| `frbr:responsibleEntityOf` | is responsible entity of | ResponsibleEntity | Endeavour | (`rdaa:` inverses) | — | approximate |\n\n**Remarks:**\n- `frbr:responsibleEntity` is a superclass of all four role properties below.\n  RDA maps it to the union of role-specific agent properties across all four\n  WEMI levels — there is no single RDA property that matches the generality\n  of `frbr:responsibleEntity`.\n- The inverse `frbr:responsibleEntityOf` corresponds to agent-side properties\n  in the `rdaa:` namespace, which are not inventoried here.\n\n#### 2.1.2 Role-specific properties\n\n| Property | Label | Domain | Range | RDA Property | RDA Label | Match |\n|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|\n| `frbr:creator` | has creator | Work | ResponsibleEntity | `rdaw:P10065` | has creator agent of work | direct |\n| `frbr:creatorOf` | is creator of | ResponsibleEntity | Work | (`rdaa:`) | — | approximate |\n| `frbr:realizer` | has realizer | Expression | ResponsibleEntity | `rdae:P20053` | has creator agent of expression | direct |\n| `frbr:realizerOf` | is realizer of | ResponsibleEntity | Expression | (`rdaa:`) | — | approximate |\n| `frbr:producer` | has producer | Manifestation | ResponsibleEntity | `rdam:P30081`; `rdam:P30082`; `rdam:P30083` | has producer agent / has manufacturer agent / has publisher agent | approximate |\n| `frbr:producerOf` | is producer of | ResponsibleEntity | Manifestation | (`rdaa:` inverses) | — | approximate |\n| `frbr:owner` | has owner | Item | ResponsibleEntity | `rdai:P40021` | has owner agent | direct |\n| `frbr:ownerOf` | is owner of | ResponsibleEntity | Item | (`rdaa:`) | — | approximate |\n\n**Remarks:**\n- `frbr:creator` → `rdaw:P10065`: direct one-to-one match. RDA also provides\n  entity-type-specific sub-properties (`rdaw:P10309` person, `rdaw:P10311`\n  corporate body, etc.) which are not listed here.\n- `frbr:realizer` → `rdae:P20053`: \"has creator agent of expression\" is RDA's\n  equivalent for the person/org responsible for the specific expression.\n- `frbr:producer`: FRBR uses one term covering production, manufacture, and\n  publication. RDA distinguishes:\n  - `rdam:P30081` — unpublished manifestations (producer)\n  - `rdam:P30082` — manufactured manifestations (manufacturer)\n  - `rdam:P30083` — published manifestations (publisher)\n- `frbr:owner` → `rdai:P40021` \"has owner agent\": direct match. RDA also\n  offers `rdai:P40018` (current owner), `rdai:P40019` (former owner), and\n  `rdai:P40020` (custodian) for finer granularity.\n- Agent-side inverses (`creatorOf`, `realizerOf`, `producerOf`, `ownerOf`)\n  correspond to `rdaa:` properties whose IDs are not inventoried here; all\n  are marked approximate.\n\n### 2.2 FRBR Core — Subject Property\n\n| Property | Label | Domain | Range | RDA Property | RDA Label | Match |\n|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|\n| `frbr:subject` | has subject | Work | Subject∪CorporateBody∪Endeavour | `rdaw:P10256`; `rdaw:P10319`; `rdaw:P10100`; (others) | has subject; has subject agent; has subject place; … | approximate |\n| `frbr:subjectOf` | is subject of | Subject | Work | — | — | no match |\n\n**Remarks:**\n- `frbr:subject` takes a broad range (any Subject, CorporateBody, or\n  Endeavour). RDA uses type-specific subject properties; the full set is\n  documented in the WEMI mapping (`output/frbr-fabio-to-rda.csv`).\n  Key RDA properties: `rdaw:P10256` (generic), `rdaw:P10319` (subject agent),\n  `rdaw:P10100` (subject place — from `dct-rda-map.csv`).\n- `frbr:subjectOf` — there is no RDA property from the subject/concept side\n  pointing back to the work; no match.\n\n### 2.3 FaBiO — Place and Subject Properties\n\n| Property | Label | Domain | Range | RDA Property | RDA Label | Match |\n|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|\n| `fabio:hasPlaceOfPublication` | has place of publication | Endeavour | `frbr:Place` | `rdam:P30088` | has place of publication | direct |\n| `fabio:hasSubjectTerm` | has subject term | Endeavour | `fabio:SubjectTerm` | `rdaw:P10256`; (type-specific) | has subject | approximate |\n| `fabio:hasPrimarySubjectTerm` | has primary subject term | Endeavour | `fabio:SubjectTerm` | `rdaw:P10256` | has subject | approximate |\n| `fabio:hasDiscipline` | has discipline | Endeavour∪TermDictionary | `fabio:SubjectDiscipline` | — | — | no match |\n| `fabio:isDisciplineOf` | is discipline of | `fabio:SubjectDiscipline` | Endeavour∪TermDictionary | — | — | no match |\n\n**Remarks:**\n- `fabio:hasPlaceOfPublication` → `rdam:P30088`: direct match in intent;\n  however FaBiO applies this to any `frbr:Endeavour` (Work, Expression,\n  Manifestation, Item), whereas `rdam:P30088` is scoped to Manifestation.\n  For Work-level place of origin, the closest RDA property is `rdaw:P10218`\n  \"has place of origin of work\".\n- `fabio:hasSubjectTerm` / `fabio:hasPrimarySubjectTerm`: FaBiO attaches\n  controlled-vocabulary terms to any Endeavour; RDA restricts subject\n  properties to Works. Both are approximate. RDA makes no distinction between\n  primary and secondary subjects.\n- `fabio:hasDiscipline` / `fabio:isDisciplineOf`: associate an Endeavour or\n  TermDictionary to its intellectual discipline. RDA has no equivalent;\n  discipline is typically handled by subject classification schemes external\n  to RDA. No match.\n\n---\n\n## 3. Summary\n\n### Classes\n\n| Source | Match | RDA |\n|---|---|---|\n| `frbr:ResponsibleEntity` | direct | `rdac:C10002` Agent |\n| `frbr:Person` | direct | `rdac:C10004` Person |\n| `frbr:CorporateBody` | direct | `rdac:C10005` Corporate Body |\n| `frbr:Place` | direct | `rdac:C10009` Place |\n| `frbr:Subject` | no match | — |\n| `frbr:Concept` | no match | — |\n| `frbr:Event` | no match | — |\n| `frbr:Object` | no match | — |\n| `fabio:SubjectDiscipline` | no match | — |\n| `fabio:SubjectTerm` | no match | — |\n| `fabio:StorageMedium` | no match | — |\n\n### Properties\n\n| Source | Match | RDA |\n|---|---|---|\n| `frbr:creator` | direct | `rdaw:P10065` |\n| `frbr:realizer` | direct | `rdae:P20053` |\n| `frbr:owner` | direct | `rdai:P40021` |\n| `fabio:hasPlaceOfPublication` | direct | `rdam:P30088` |\n| `frbr:responsibleEntity` | approximate | `rdaw:P10065`; `rdae:P20053`; `rdam:P30329`; `rdai:P40021` |\n| `frbr:producer` | approximate | `rdam:P30081`; `rdam:P30082`; `rdam:P30083` |\n| `frbr:subject` | approximate | `rdaw:P10256`; `rdaw:P10319`; others |\n| `fabio:hasSubjectTerm` | approximate | `rdaw:P10256` |\n| `fabio:hasPrimarySubjectTerm` | approximate | `rdaw:P10256` |\n| `frbr:responsibleEntityOf` | approximate | (`rdaa:` inverses) |\n| `frbr:creatorOf` | approximate | (`rdaa:`) |\n| `frbr:realizerOf` | approximate | (`rdaa:`) |\n| `frbr:producerOf` | approximate | (`rdaa:` inverses) |\n| `frbr:ownerOf` | approximate | (`rdaa:`) |\n| `frbr:subjectOf` | no match | — |\n| `fabio:hasDiscipline` | no match | — |\n| `fabio:isDisciplineOf` | no match | — |\n"
}
```

```json
{
  "file_path": "/Users/mta/Documents/claude/mocho/scripts/gen_nonwemi_mapping.py",
  "content": "\"\"\"\ngen_nonwemi_mapping.py\n\nExtract the non-WEMI FRBR Core / FaBiO → RDA mappings from the canonical\nmapping data defined in this script and write to CSV and JSON.\n\nReads: (none — data is embedded)\n\nWrites:\n  output/frbr-fabio-nonwemi-to-rda.csv\n  output/frbr-fabio-nonwemi-to-rda.json\n\nColumns (same as frbr-fabio-to-rda.csv):\n  source_property  — prefixed FRBR/FaBiO class or property IRI\n  rda_property     — semicolon-separated prefixed RDA class/property IRI(s) with labels\n  domain           — domain class (or \"—\" for class mappings)\n  range            — range class (or \"—\" for class mappings)\n  match            — direct | approximate | no match\n  remarks          — free-text notes\n\nUsage:\n  python scripts/gen_nonwemi_mapping.py [--out-csv ...] [--out-json ...]\n\"\"\"\n\nimport argparse\nimport csv\nimport json\nfrom pathlib import Path\n\n# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Mapping data\n# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nROWS = [\n    # -----------------------------------------------------------------------\n    # Class mappings  (domain=range=\"—\" to mark these as class rows)\n    # -----------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n    # FRBR Group 2 — Responsible Entities\n    {\n        \"source_property\": \"frbr:ResponsibleEntity (class)\",\n        \"rda_property\": 'rdac:C10002 \"Agent\"',\n        \"domain\": \"—\",\n        \"range\": \"—\",\n        \"match\": \"direct\",\n        \"remarks\": \"FRBR Group 2 superclass; RDA Agent is the equivalent superclass for Person, Corporate Body, Family.\",\n    },\n    {\n        \"source_property\": \"frbr:Person (class)\",\n        \"rda_property\": 'rdac:C10004 \"Person\"',\n        \"domain\": \"—\",\n        \"range\": \"—\",\n        \"match\": \"direct\",\n        \"remarks\": \"FRBR Group 2; maps directly to RDA Person class.\",\n    },\n    {\n        \"source_property\": \"frbr:CorporateBody (class)\",\n        \"rda_property\": 'rdac:C10005 \"Corporate Body\"',\n        \"domain\": \"—\",\n        \"range\": \"—\",\n        \"match\": \"direct\",\n        \"remarks\": \"FRBR Group 2; maps directly to RDA Corporate Body class.\",\n    },\n\n    # FRBR Group 3 — Subjects\n    {\n        \"source_property\": \"frbr:Subject (class)\",\n        \"rda_property\": \"\",\n        \"domain\": \"—\",\n        \"range\": \"—\",\n        \"match\": \"no match\",\n        \"remarks\": \"RDA has no generic Subject superclass; subjects are typed through property selection.\",\n    },\n    {\n        \"source_property\": \"frbr:Concept (class)\",\n        \"rda_property\": \"\",\n        \"domain\": \"—\",\n        \"range\": \"—\",\n        \"match\": \"no match\",\n        \"remarks\": \"RDA externalises concept subjects to SKOS vocabularies; no corresponding RDA class.\",\n    },\n    {\n        \"source_property\": \"frbr:Event (class)\",\n        \"rda_property\": \"\",\n        \"domain\": \"—\",\n        \"range\": \"—\",\n        \"match\": \"no match\",\n        \"remarks\": \"RDA has rdac:C10010 Timespan (a finite period of time) but no Event class. Timespan ≠ Event.\",\n    },\n    {\n        \"source_property\": \"frbr:Object (class)\",\n        \"rda_property\": \"\",\n        \"domain\": \"—\",\n        \"range\": \"—\",\n        \"match\": \"no match\",\n        \"remarks\": \"No RDA equivalent for material-thing subjects.\",\n    },\n    {\n        \"source_property\": \"frbr:Place (class)\",\n        \"rda_property\": 'rdac:C10009 \"Place\"',\n        \"domain\": \"—\",\n        \"range\": \"—\",\n        \"match\": \"direct\",\n        \"remarks\": \"FRBR Group 3; maps directly to RDA Place class (a given extent of space).\",\n    },\n\n    # FaBiO non-WEMI classes\n    {\n        \"source_property\": \"fabio:SubjectDiscipline (class)\",\n        \"rda_property\": \"\",\n        \"domain\": \"—\",\n        \"range\": \"—\",\n        \"match\": \"no match\",\n        \"remarks\": \"Intellectual field/domain (e.g. biology). RDA has no equivalent class.\",\n    },\n    {\n        \"source_property\": \"fabio:SubjectTerm (class)\",\n        \"rda_property\": \"\",\n        \"domain\": \"—\",\n        \"range\": \"—\",\n        \"match\": \"no match\",\n        \"remarks\": \"Controlled-vocabulary entry. RDA uses skos:Concept in equivalent roles; no native RDA class.\",\n    },\n    {\n        \"source_property\": \"fabio:StorageMedium (class)\",\n        \"rda_property\": \"\",\n        \"domain\": \"—\",\n        \"range\": \"—\",\n        \"match\": \"no match\",\n        \"remarks\": \"Physical carrier for a fabio:Item. RDA describes carrier characteristics through Manifestation properties (carrier type, base material), not a separate class.\",\n    },\n\n    # -----------------------------------------------------------------------\n    # Property mappings\n    # -----------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n    # Generic responsible-entity\n    {\n        \"source_property\": \"frbr:responsibleEntity\",\n        \"rda_property\": (\n            'rdaw:P10065 \"has creator agent of work\"; '\n            'rdae:P20053 \"has creator agent of expression\"; '\n            'rdam:P30329 \"has creator agent of manifestation\"; '\n            'rdai:P40021 \"has owner agent\"'\n        ),\n        \"domain\": \"frbr:Endeavour\",\n        \"range\": \"frbr:ResponsibleEntity\",\n        \"match\": \"approximate\",\n        \"remarks\": (\n            \"FRBR's single generic property; RDA replaces it with role-specific and \"\n            \"entity-level-specific subproperties. The four listed cover creator/realizer/\"\n            \"producer/owner roles at each WEMI level.\"\n        ),\n    },\n    {\n        \"source_property\": \"frbr:responsibleEntityOf\",\n        \"rda_property\": \"\",\n        \"domain\": \"frbr:ResponsibleEntity\",\n        \"range\": \"frbr:Endeavour\",\n        \"match\": \"approximate\",\n        \"remarks\": \"Inverse of frbr:responsibleEntity; corresponds to rdaa: agent-side properties whose specific IDs are not enumerated here.\",\n    },\n\n    # Creator\n    {\n        \"source_property\": \"frbr:creator\",\n        \"rda_property\": 'rdaw:P10065 \"has creator agent of work\"',\n        \"domain\": \"frbr:Work\",\n        \"range\": \"frbr:ResponsibleEntity\",\n        \"match\": \"direct\",\n        \"remarks\": (\n            \"One-to-one match. RDA also provides entity-type-specific sub-properties \"\n            \"(person, corporate body, collective agent) not listed here.\"\n        ),\n    },\n    {\n        \"source_property\": \"frbr:creatorOf\",\n        \"rda_property\": \"\",\n        \"domain\": \"frbr:ResponsibleEntity\",\n        \"range\": \"frbr:Work\",\n        \"match\": \"approximate\",\n        \"remarks\": \"Agent-side inverse; corresponds to rdaa: properties whose IDs are not inventoried here.\",\n    },\n\n    # Realizer\n    {\n        \"source_property\": \"frbr:realizer\",\n        \"rda_property\": 'rdae:P20053 \"has creator agent of expression\"',\n        \"domain\": \"frbr:Expression\",\n        \"range\": \"frbr:ResponsibleEntity\",\n        \"match\": \"direct\",\n        \"remarks\": \"RDA's term 'creator agent of expression' corresponds directly to FRBR's 'realizer' (the agent responsible for a specific expression).\",\n    },\n    {\n        \"source_property\": \"frbr:realizerOf\",\n        \"rda_property\": \"\",\n        \"domain\": \"frbr:ResponsibleEntity\",\n        \"range\": \"frbr:Expression\",\n        \"match\": \"approximate\",\n        \"remarks\": \"Agent-side inverse; rdaa: properties not enumerated.\",\n    },\n\n    # Producer\n    {\n        \"source_property\": \"frbr:producer\",\n        \"rda_property\": (\n            'rdam:P30081 \"has producer agent of unpublished manifestation\"; '\n            'rdam:P30082 \"has manufacturer agent\"; '\n            'rdam:P30083 \"has publisher agent\"'\n        ),\n        \"domain\": \"frbr:Manifestation\",\n        \"range\": \"frbr:ResponsibleEntity\",\n        \"match\": \"approximate\",\n        \"remarks\": (\n            \"FRBR 'producer' covers production, manufacture, and publication. \"\n            \"RDA splits these into three distinct roles: producer (unpublished), \"\n            \"manufacturer (physically produced), and publisher (commercially released).\"\n        ),\n    },\n    {\n        \"source_property\": \"frbr:producerOf\",\n        \"rda_property\": \"\",\n        \"domain\": \"frbr:ResponsibleEntity\",\n        \"range\": \"frbr:Manifestation\",\n        \"match\": \"approximate\",\n        \"remarks\": \"Agent-side inverses for publisher/manufacturer roles; rdaa: properties not enumerated.\",\n    },\n\n    # Owner\n    {\n        \"source_property\": \"frbr:owner\",\n        \"rda_property\": 'rdai:P40021 \"has owner agent\"',\n        \"domain\": \"frbr:Item\",\n        \"range\": \"frbr:ResponsibleEntity\",\n        \"match\": \"direct\",\n        \"remarks\": (\n            \"Direct match. RDA also offers rdai:P40018 (current owner), \"\n            \"rdai:P40019 (former owner), and rdai:P40020 (custodian) for finer granularity.\"\n        ),\n    },\n    {\n        \"source_property\": \"frbr:ownerOf\",\n        \"rda_property\": \"\",\n        \"domain\": \"frbr:ResponsibleEntity\",\n        \"range\": \"frbr:Item\",\n        \"match\": \"approximate\",\n        \"remarks\": \"Agent-side inverse; rdaa: properties not enumerated.\",\n    },\n\n    # Subject\n    {\n        \"source_property\": \"frbr:subject\",\n        \"rda_property\": (\n            'rdaw:P10256 \"has subject\"; '\n            'rdaw:P10319 \"has subject agent\"; '\n            'rdaw:P10100 \"has subject place\"'\n        ),\n        \"domain\": \"frbr:Work\",\n        \"range\": \"frbr:Subject\",\n        \"match\": \"approximate\",\n        \"remarks\": (\n            \"frbr:subject takes a broad undifferentiated range. RDA uses type-specific \"\n            \"subject properties; the full set of 42 subject properties is documented in \"\n            \"output/frbr-fabio-to-rda.csv and output/dct-rda-map.csv.\"\n        ),\n    },\n    {\n        \"source_property\": \"frbr:subjectOf\",\n        \"rda_property\": \"\",\n        \"domain\": \"frbr:Subject\",\n        \"range\": \"frbr:Work\",\n        \"match\": \"no match\",\n        \"remarks\": \"No RDA property from the subject/concept side pointing back to the work.\",\n    },\n\n    # FaBiO place and subject properties\n    {\n        \"source_property\": \"fabio:hasPlaceOfPublication\",\n        \"rda_property\": 'rdam:P30088 \"has place of publication\"',\n        \"domain\": \"frbr:Endeavour\",\n        \"range\": \"frbr:Place\",\n        \"match\": \"direct\",\n        \"remarks\": (\n            \"Direct match in intent. FaBiO applies this to any Endeavour; rdam:P30088 \"\n            \"is scoped to Manifestation. For Work-level place, the closest RDA property \"\n            \"is rdaw:P10218 'has place of origin of work'.\"\n        ),\n    },\n    {\n        \"source_property\": \"fabio:hasSubjectTerm\",\n        \"rda_property\": 'rdaw:P10256 \"has subject\"',\n        \"domain\": \"frbr:Endeavour\",\n        \"range\": \"fabio:SubjectTerm\",\n        \"match\": \"approximate\",\n        \"remarks\": (\n            \"FaBiO attaches controlled-vocabulary terms to any Endeavour; RDA restricts \"\n            \"subject properties to Works. RDA subject properties are also type-specific \"\n            \"(agent, concept, place, etc.).\"\n        ),\n    },\n    {\n        \"source_property\": \"fabio:hasPrimarySubjectTerm\",\n        \"rda_property\": 'rdaw:P10256 \"has subject\"',\n        \"domain\": \"frbr:Endeavour\",\n        \"range\": \"fabio:SubjectTerm\",\n        \"match\": \"approximate\",\n        \"remarks\": \"Sub-property of fabio:hasSubjectTerm; RDA makes no primary/secondary subject distinction.\",\n    },\n    {\n        \"source_property\": \"fabio:hasDiscipline\",\n        \"rda_property\": \"\",\n        \"domain\": \"frbr:Endeavour\",\n        \"range\": \"fabio:SubjectDiscipline\",\n        \"match\": \"no match\",\n        \"remarks\": \"Associates a resource or vocabulary to its intellectual discipline. No RDA equivalent.\",\n    },\n    {\n        \"source_property\": \"fabio:isDisciplineOf\",\n        \"rda_property\": \"\",\n        \"domain\": \"fabio:SubjectDiscipline\",\n        \"range\": \"frbr:Endeavour\",\n        \"match\": \"no match\",\n        \"remarks\": \"Inverse of fabio:hasDiscipline. No RDA equivalent.\",\n    },\n]\n\n\n# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Helpers\n# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\ndef rda_property_list(cell: str) -> list[str]:\n    \"\"\"Split a semicolon-separated rda_property cell into a list of strings.\"\"\"\n    if not cell:\n        return []\n    return [s.strip() for s in cell.split(\";\") if s.strip()]\n\n\n# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Main\n# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\ndef main():\n    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description=__doc__)\n    parser.add_argument(\"--out-csv\",  default=\"output/frbr-fabio-nonwemi-to-rda.csv\")\n    parser.add_argument(\"--out-json\", default=\"output/frbr-fabio-nonwemi-to-rda.json\")\n    args = parser.parse_args()\n\n    out_csv  = Path(args.out_csv)\n    out_json = Path(args.out_json)\n    out_csv.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n\n    fieldnames = [\"source_property\", \"rda_property\", \"domain\", \"range\", \"match\", \"remarks\"]\n\n    # CSV\n    with open(out_csv, \"w\", newline=\"\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\n        writer = csv.DictWriter(f, fieldnames=fieldnames)\n        writer.writeheader()\n        writer.writerows(ROWS)\n    print(f\"Wrote {len(ROWS)} rows → {out_csv}\")\n\n    # JSON  (rda_property as list)\n    json_rows = []\n    for row in ROWS:\n        jr = dict(row)\n        jr[\"rda_property\"] = rda_property_list(row[\"rda_property\"])\n        json_rows.append(jr)\n\n    with open(out_json, \"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\n        json.dump(json_rows, f, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)\n    print(f\"Wrote {len(json_rows)} rows → {out_json}\")\n\n    # Summary\n    from collections import Counter\n    counts = Counter(r[\"match\"] for r in ROWS)\n    for match, n in sorted(counts.items()):\n        print(f\"  {match}: {n}\")\n\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    main()\n"
}
```

```json
{
  "command": "python3 -c \"\nimport xml.etree.ElementTree as ET\n\nRDF = 'http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#'\nRDFS = 'http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#'\nLANG = '{http://www.w3.org/XML/1998/namespace}lang'\n\nkeywords = ['creator', 'realizer', 'producer', 'owner', 'manufacturer', 'publisher',\n            'responsible', 'custodian', 'work agent', 'expression agent',\n            'manifestation agent', 'item agent']\n\nfor fname in ['object.xml', 'datatype.xml']:\n    tree = ET.parse(f'/Users/mta/Documents/claude/mocho/ontology/RDA-Vocabularies-5.4.9/xml/Elements/a/{fname}')\n    for desc in tree.findall(f'.//{{{RDF}}}Description'):\n        iri = desc.get(f'{{{RDF}}}about', '')\n        if '/Elements/a/' not in iri:\n            continue\n        label = ''\n        for child in desc:\n            if child.tag == f'{{{RDFS}}}label' and child.get(LANG) == 'en':\n                label = (child.text or '').strip()\n        if label and any(k in label.lower() for k in keywords):\n            pid = iri.split('/')[-1]\n            print(f'{pid}  {label}')\n\" 2>/dev/null | sort -t' ' -k2",
  "description": "Find RDA Agent inverse properties for creator/realizer/producer/owner roles"
}
```

### User *(2026-02-25T17:21:03.135Z)*

**Tool result**
```
     1→# FRBR Core and FaBiO Non-WEMI → RDA Mapping
     2→
     3→## Scope
     4→
     5→Maps FRBR Core (`http://purl.org/vocab/frbr/core#`) and FaBiO (`http://purl.org/spar/fabio/`)
     6→classes and properties that are **not** Work / Expression / Manifestation / Item (WEMI)
     7→entities. The non-WEMI layer corresponds to EDM's `edm:Agent`, `edm:Place`, and
     8→`edm:TimeSpan` roles:
     9→
    10→- **Group 2** — responsible entities: `frbr:Person`, `frbr:CorporateBody`
    11→- **Group 3** — subjects: `frbr:Concept`, `frbr:Event`, `frbr:Object`, `frbr:Place`
    12→- **Linking properties** — properties connecting WEMI entities to Group 2/3 entities
    13→- **FaBiO-specific** — `fabio:SubjectDiscipline`, `fabio:SubjectTerm`,
    14→  `fabio:StorageMedium`, and their associated properties
    15→
    16→RDA classes use the `rdac:` prefix (`https://rdaregistry.info/Elements/c/`).
    17→RDA Agent properties use `rdaa:` (`https://rdaregistry.info/Elements/a/`).
    18→RDA W/E/M/I properties use `rdaw:/rdae:/rdam:/rdai:` as usual.
    19→
    20→---
    21→
    22→## 1. Class Mappings
    23→
    24→### 1.1 FRBR Core — Group 2: Responsible Entities (Agent-like)
    25→
    26→| FRBR Class | Label | RDA Class | Label | Match |
    27→|---|---|---|---|---|
    28→| `frbr:ResponsibleEntity` | responsible entity | `rdac:C10002` | Agent | direct |
    29→| `frbr:Person` | person | `rdac:C10004` | Person | direct |
    30→| `frbr:CorporateBody` | corporate body | `rdac:C10005` | Corporate Body | direct |
    31→
    32→**Notes:**
    33→- `frbr:ResponsibleEntity` is a superclass of both `frbr:Person` and `frbr:CorporateBody`.
    34→  `rdac:C10002` Agent plays the same role in RDA, also subsumes Person
    35→  (`rdac:C10004`) and Corporate Body (`rdac:C10005`).
    36→- RDA additionally defines `rdac:C10008` Family and `rdac:C10011` Collective Agent,
    37→  which have no FRBR equivalents.
    38→
    39→### 1.2 FRBR Core — Group 3: Subjects
    40→
    41→| FRBR Class | Label | RDA Class | Label | Match |
    42→|---|---|---|---|---|
    43→| `frbr:Subject` | subject | — | — | no match |
    44→| `frbr:Concept` | concept | — | — | no match |
    45→| `frbr:Event` | event | — | — | no match |
    46→| `frbr:Object` | object | — | — | no match |
    47→| `frbr:Place` | place | `rdac:C10009` | Place | direct |
    48→
    49→**Notes:**
    50→- RDA has no generic `Subject` superclass. Subjects are expressed through
    51→  type-specific properties (`rdaw:P10256` subject agent, `rdaw:P10100`
    52→  subject place, etc.) rather than a class hierarchy.
    53→- `frbr:Concept` — RDA externalises concept subjects to SKOS vocabularies;
    54→  no RDA concept class.
    55→- `frbr:Event` — RDA has `rdac:C10010` Timespan ("a finite period of time")
    56→  but this is a duration, not an event. No direct match.
    57→- `frbr:Object` — No RDA equivalent.
    58→- `frbr:Place` → `rdac:C10009` ("a given extent of space") is a direct match.
    59→
    60→### 1.3 FaBiO Non-WEMI Classes
    61→
    62→| FaBiO Class | Label | RDA Class | Label | Match |
    63→|---|---|---|---|---|
    64→| `fabio:SubjectDiscipline` | subject discipline | — | — | no match |
    65→| `fabio:SubjectTerm` | subject term | — | — | no match |
    66→| `fabio:StorageMedium` | storage medium | — | — | no match |
    67→
    68→**Notes:**
    69→- `fabio:SubjectDiscipline` — the intellectual field or domain (e.g. biology,
    70→  linguistics). RDA describes subjects through controlled-vocabulary terms
    71→  with no corresponding class.
    72→- `fabio:SubjectTerm` — a controlled-vocabulary entry. RDA uses `skos:Concept`
    73→  (external) in equivalent roles; no RDA class for vocabulary terms.
    74→- `fabio:StorageMedium` — the physical carrier upon which a `fabio:Item` is
    75→  stored. RDA describes carrier characteristics through Manifestation
    76→  properties (carrier type, media type, base material), not through a
    77→  separate StorageMedium class.
    78→
    79→---
    80→
    81→## 2. Property Mappings
    82→
    83→### 2.1 FRBR Core — Agent-Role Properties
    84→
    85→These properties connect WEMI entities to `frbr:ResponsibleEntity` instances.
    86→RDA replaces the single generic responsible-entity property with a set of
    87→role-specific and entity-level-specific properties.
    88→
    89→#### 2.1.1 Generic responsible-entity properties
    90→
    91→| Property | Label | Domain | Range | RDA Property | RDA Label | Match |
    92→|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
    93→| `frbr:responsibleEntity` | has responsible entity | Endeavour | ResponsibleEntity | `rdaw:P10065`; `rdae:P20053`; `rdam:P30329`; `rdai:P40021` | (role-specific set) | approximate |
    94→| `frbr:responsibleEntityOf` | is responsible entity of | ResponsibleEntity | Endeavour | (`rdaa:` inverses) | — | approximate |
    95→
    96→**Remarks:**
    97→- `frbr:responsibleEntity` is a superclass of all four role properties below.
    98→  RDA maps it to the union of role-specific agent properties across all four
    99→  WEMI levels — there is no single RDA property that matches the generality
   100→  of `frbr:responsibleEntity`.
   101→- The inverse `frbr:responsibleEntityOf` corresponds to agent-side properties
   102→  in the `rdaa:` namespace, which are not inventoried here.
   103→
   104→#### 2.1.2 Role-specific properties
   105→
   106→| Property | Label | Domain | Range | RDA Property | RDA Label | Match |
   107→|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
   108→| `frbr:creator` | has creator | Work | ResponsibleEntity | `rdaw:P10065` | has creator agent of work | direct |
   109→| `frbr:creatorOf` | is creator of | ResponsibleEntity | Work | (`rdaa:`) | — | approximate |
   110→| `frbr:realizer` | has realizer | Expression | ResponsibleEntity | `rdae:P20053` | has creator agent of expression | direct |
   111→| `frbr:realizerOf` | is realizer of | ResponsibleEntity | Expression | (`rdaa:`) | — | approximate |
   112→| `frbr:producer` | has producer | Manifestation | ResponsibleEntity | `rdam:P30081`; `rdam:P30082`; `rdam:P30083` | has producer agent / has manufacturer agent / has publisher agent | approximate |
   113→| `frbr:producerOf` | is producer of | ResponsibleEntity | Manifestation | (`rdaa:` inverses) | — | approximate |
   114→| `frbr:owner` | has owner | Item | ResponsibleEntity | `rdai:P40021` | has owner agent | direct |
   115→| `frbr:ownerOf` | is owner of | ResponsibleEntity | Item | (`rdaa:`) | — | approximate |
   116→
   117→**Remarks:**
   118→- `frbr:creator` → `rdaw:P10065`: direct one-to-one match. RDA also provides
   119→  entity-type-specific sub-properties (`rdaw:P10309` person, `rdaw:P10311`
   120→  corporate body, etc.) which are not listed here.
   121→- `frbr:realizer` → `rdae:P20053`: "has creator agent of expression" is RDA's
   122→  equivalent for the person/org responsible for the specific expression.
   123→- `frbr:producer`: FRBR uses one term covering production, manufacture, and
   124→  publication. RDA distinguishes:
   125→  - `rdam:P30081` — unpublished manifestations (producer)
   126→  - `rdam:P30082` — manufactured manifestations (manufacturer)
   127→  - `rdam:P30083` — published manifestations (publisher)
   128→- `frbr:owner` → `rdai:P40021` "has owner agent": direct match. RDA also
   129→  offers `rdai:P40018` (current owner), `rdai:P40019` (former owner), and
   130→  `rdai:P40020` (custodian) for finer granularity.
   131→- Agent-side inverses (`creatorOf`, `realizerOf`, `producerOf`, `ownerOf`)
   132→  correspond to `rdaa:` properties whose IDs are not inventoried here; all
   133→  are marked approximate.
   134→
   135→### 2.2 FRBR Core — Subject Property
   136→
   137→| Property | Label | Domain | Range | RDA Property | RDA Label | Match |
   138→|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
   139→| `frbr:subject` | has subject | Work | Subject∪CorporateBody∪Endeavour | `rdaw:P10256`; `rdaw:P10319`; `rdaw:P10100`; (others) | has subject; has subject agent; has subject place; … | approximate |
   140→| `frbr:subjectOf` | is subject of | Subject | Work | — | — | no match |
   141→
   142→**Remarks:**
   143→- `frbr:subject` takes a broad range (any Subject, CorporateBody, or
   144→  Endeavour). RDA uses type-specific subject properties; the full set is
   145→  documented in the WEMI mapping (`output/frbr-fabio-to-rda.csv`).
   146→  Key RDA properties: `rdaw:P10256` (generic), `rdaw:P10319` (subject agent),
   147→  `rdaw:P10100` (subject place — from `dct-rda-map.csv`).
   148→- `frbr:subjectOf` — there is no RDA property from the subject/concept side
   149→  pointing back to the work; no match.
   150→
   151→### 2.3 FaBiO — Place and Subject Properties
   152→
   153→| Property | Label | Domain | Range | RDA Property | RDA Label | Match |
   154→|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
   155→| `fabio:hasPlaceOfPublication` | has place of publication | Endeavour | `frbr:Place` | `rdam:P30088` | has place of publication | direct |
   156→| `fabio:hasSubjectTerm` | has subject term | Endeavour | `fabio:SubjectTerm` | `rdaw:P10256`; (type-specific) | has subject | approximate |
   157→| `fabio:hasPrimarySubjectTerm` | has primary subject term | Endeavour | `fabio:SubjectTerm` | `rdaw:P10256` | has subject | approximate |
   158→| `fabio:hasDiscipline` | has discipline | Endeavour∪TermDictionary | `fabio:SubjectDiscipline` | — | — | no match |
   159→| `fabio:isDisciplineOf` | is discipline of | `fabio:SubjectDiscipline` | Endeavour∪TermDictionary | — | — | no match |
   160→
   161→**Remarks:**
   162→- `fabio:hasPlaceOfPublication` → `rdam:P30088`: direct match in intent;
   163→  however FaBiO applies this to any `frbr:Endeavour` (Work, Expression,
   164→  Manifestation, Item), whereas `rdam:P30088` is scoped to Manifestation.
   165→  For Work-level place of origin, the closest RDA property is `rdaw:P10218`
   166→  "has place of origin of work".
   167→- `fabio:hasSubjectTerm` / `fabio:hasPrimarySubjectTerm`: FaBiO attaches
   168→  controlled-vocabulary terms to any Endeavour; RDA restricts subject
   169→  properties to Works. Both are approximate. RDA makes no distinction between
   170→  primary and secondary subjects.
   171→- `fabio:hasDiscipline` / `fabio:isDisciplineOf`: associate an Endeavour or
   172→  TermDictionary to its intellectual discipline. RDA has no equivalent;
   173→  discipline is typically handled by subject classification schemes external
   174→  to RDA. No match.
   175→
   176→---
   177→
   178→## 3. Summary
   179→
   180→### Classes
   181→
   182→| Source | Match | RDA |
   183→|---|---|---|
   184→| `frbr:ResponsibleEntity` | direct | `rdac:C10002` Agent |
   185→| `frbr:Person` | direct | `rdac:C10004` Person |
   186→| `frbr:CorporateBody` | direct | `rdac:C10005` Corporate Body |
   187→| `frbr:Place` | direct | `rdac:C10009` Place |
   188→| `frbr:Subject` | no match | — |
   189→| `frbr:Concept` | no match | — |
   190→| `frbr:Event` | no match | — |
   191→| `frbr:Object` | no match | — |
   192→| `fabio:SubjectDiscipline` | no match | — |
   193→| `fabio:SubjectTerm` | no match | — |
   194→| `fabio:StorageMedium` | no match | — |
   195→
   196→### Properties
   197→
   198→| Source | Match | RDA |
   199→|---|---|---|
   200→| `frbr:creator` | direct | `rdaw:P10065` |
   201→| `frbr:realizer` | direct | `rdae:P20053` |
   202→| `frbr:owner` | direct | `rdai:P40021` |
   203→| `fabio:hasPlaceOfPublication` | direct | `rdam:P30088` |
   204→| `frbr:responsibleEntity` | approximate | `rdaw:P10065`; `rdae:P20053`; `rdam:P30329`; `rdai:P40021` |
   205→| `frbr:producer` | approximate | `rdam:P30081`; `rdam:P30082`; `rdam:P30083` |
   206→| `frbr:subject` | approximate | `rdaw:P10256`; `rdaw:P10319`; others |
   207→| `fabio:hasSubjectTerm` | approximate | `rdaw:P10256` |
   208→| `fabio:hasPrimarySubjectTerm` | approximate | `rdaw:P10256` |
   209→| `frbr:responsibleEntityOf` | approximate | (`rdaa:` inverses) |
   210→| `frbr:creatorOf` | approximate | (`rdaa:`) |
   211→| `frbr:realizerOf` | approximate | (`rdaa:`) |
   212→| `frbr:producerOf` | approximate | (`rdaa:` inverses) |
   213→| `frbr:ownerOf` | approximate | (`rdaa:`) |
   214→| `frbr:subjectOf` | no match | — |
   215→| `fabio:hasDiscipline` | no match | — |
   216→| `fabio:isDisciplineOf` | no match | — |
   217→



```

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - FRBR Group 2 (responsible entities: Person, CorporateBody) and Group 3 (subjects: Concept, Event, Object, Place) — non-WEMI classes
   - RDA classes: rdac:C10002 Agent, C10004 Person, C10005 Corporate Body, C10009 Place, C10010 Timespan
   - RDA Agent namespace (rdaa:) — agent-side inverse properties in a/object.xml and a/datatype.xml
   - RDA W/E/M/I namespaces for forward-direction linking properties
   - Match taxonomy: direct | approximate | partial | no match (plus deprecated/level mismatch used in WEMI doc)
   - Approximate match criteria (informal, currently unstated): (1) one source property maps to multiple RDA properties due to coarser FRBR granularity; (2) domain/scope mismatch (FaBiO applies to Endeavour broadly, RDA scopes to specific entity level); (3) conceptual overlap but not semantic equivalence; (4) agent-side set of role-specific properties with no single RDA equivalent
   - IRI normalization: dct-rda-map.csv uses http://, rda_terms.txt uses https:// for properties, http:// for c/ classes
   - rdaa: property IDs found: P50204 (is creator agent of work of), P50161 (is creator agent of expression of), P50477 (is creator agent of manifestation of), P50165 (is owner agent of), P50200 (is producer agent of unpublished manifestation of), P50202 (is manufacturer agent of), P50203 (is publisher agent of), P50162 (current owner), P50163 (former owner)
   - 42 RDA subject properties under dcterms:subject mapping

3. Files and Code Sections:

   - **output/dct-rda-map.csv**
     - 78 rows: dct_term, rda_iri, rda_label
     - Re-generated at session start with Work property labels now populated (fix from prior session)
     - One gap remains: rdaa:P50039 (Agent namespace) has no label

   - **mocho-odk/imports/rda_terms.txt**
     - 127 lines total (4 c/ classes + 123 properties)
     - Classes (lines 1–4) use http://, properties use https://
     - 73 IRIs appended from dct-rda-map.csv, normalizing http→https for w/e/m/i/a namespaces
     - Key code for merge logic:
     ```python
     def normalise(iri):
         if iri.startswith("http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/c/"):
             return iri  # classes use http
         return iri.replace("http://rdaregistry.info/", "https://rdaregistry.info/")
     ```
     - Deduplication handled by canonical set covering both http:// and https:// variants

   - **docs/frbr-fabio-nonwemi-rda-mapping.md** (created this session)
     - Scope: FRBR/FaBiO non-WEMI classes and properties mapped to RDA, analogous to edm:Agent/Place/TimeSpan
     - Sections: 1. Class Mappings (Group 2, Group 3, FaBiO); 2. Property Mappings (agent-role, subject, FaBiO place/subject); 3. Summary
     - Class mappings: frbr:ResponsibleEntity→rdac:C10002, frbr:Person→rdac:C10004, frbr:CorporateBody→rdac:C10005, frbr:Place→rdac:C10009 (direct); frbr:Subject/Concept/Event/Object + fabio:SubjectDiscipline/SubjectTerm/StorageMedium (no match)
     - Property mappings now include actual rdaa: IDs for all inverses
     - frbr:subject now lists all 42 RDA subject properties explicitly
     - Currently missing: explicit statement of criteria for "approximate" match quality

   - **scripts/gen_nonwemi_mapping.py** (created this session)
     - Contains ROWS list with 28 mapping entries (11 direct, 7 approximate, 10 no match)
     - Each row: source_property, rda_property (semicolon-separated), domain, range, match, remarks
     - Writes output/frbr-fabio-nonwemi-to-rda.csv and .json
     - rda_property in JSON is split into a list by semicolons
     - Key structure:
     ```python
     ROWS = [
         # class rows: domain=range="—"
         {"source_property": "frbr:ResponsibleEntity (class)", "rda_property": 'rdac:C10002 "Agent"', "domain": "—", "range": "—", "match": "direct", "remarks": "..."},
         # property rows
         {"source_property": "frbr:creator", "rda_property": 'rdaw:P10065 "has creator agent of work"', "domain": "frbr:Work", "range": "frbr:ResponsibleEntity", "match": "direct", "remarks": "..."},
         ...
     ]
     def rda_property_list(cell): return [s.strip() for s in cell.split(";") if s.strip()]
     ```

   - **output/frbr-fabio-nonwemi-to-rda.csv** and **output/frbr-fabio-nonwemi-to-rda.json**

```
     1→# FRBR Core and FaBiO Non-WEMI → RDA Mapping
     2→
     3→## Scope
     4→
     5→Maps FRBR Core (`http://purl.org/vocab/frbr/core#`) and FaBiO (`http://purl.org/spar/fabio/`)
     6→classes and properties that are **not** Work / Expression / Manifestation / Item (WEMI)
     7→entities. The non-WEMI layer corresponds to EDM's `edm:Agent`, `edm:Place`, and
     8→`edm:TimeSpan` roles:
     9→
    10→- **Group 2** — responsible entities: `frbr:Person`, `frbr:CorporateBody`
    11→- **Group 3** — subjects: `frbr:Concept`, `frbr:Event`, `frbr:Object`, `frbr:Place`
    12→- **Linking properties** — properties connecting WEMI entities to Group 2/3 entities
    13→- **FaBiO-specific** — `fabio:SubjectDiscipline`, `fabio:SubjectTerm`,
    14→  `fabio:StorageMedium`, and their associated properties
    15→
    16→RDA classes use the `rdac:` prefix (`https://rdaregistry.info/Elements/c/`).
    17→RDA Agent properties use `rdaa:` (`https://rdaregistry.info/Elements/a/`).
    18→RDA W/E/M/I properties use `rdaw:/rdae:/rdam:/rdai:` as usual.
    19→
    20→---
    21→
    22→## 1. Class Mappings
    23→
    24→### 1.1 FRBR Core — Group 2: Responsible Entities (Agent-like)
    25→
    26→| FRBR Class | Label | RDA Class | Label | Match |
    27→|---|---|---|---|---|
    28→| `frbr:ResponsibleEntity` | responsible entity | `rdac:C10002` | Agent | direct |
    29→| `frbr:Person` | person | `rdac:C10004` | Person | direct |
    30→| `frbr:CorporateBody` | corporate body | `rdac:C10005` | Corporate Body | direct |



```

### User *(2026-02-25T17:29:45.669Z)*

**Tool result**
```
     1→# FRBR / FaBiO WEMI Properties → RDA Mapping
     2→
     3→This document maps WEMI-related properties from two source ontologies to their closest RDA 5.4.9 equivalents.
     4→
     5→**Sources**
     6→- FRBR frbr: `ontology/frbr.ttl` (Essential FRBR in OWL2 DL, `http://purl.org/vocab/frbr/core#`)
     7→- FaBiO: `ontology/fabio.owl`
     8→- RDA 5.4.9: `ontology/RDA-Vocabularies-5.4.9/xml/Elements/{w,e,m,i}/datatype.xml` and `object.xml`
     9→
    10→---
    11→
    12→## Summary table
    13→
    14→| FaBiO property | Domain → Range | RDA equivalent | RDA ID | Match quality |
    15→|---|---|---|---|---|
    16→| `fabio:hasManifestation` | Work → Manifestation | has manifestation of work | `rdaw:P10072` | ✓ direct |
    17→| `fabio:isManifestationOf` | Manifestation → Work | has work manifested | `rdam:P30135` | ✓ direct |
    18→| `fabio:hasRepresentation` | Expression → Item | has related item of expression | `rdae:P20300` | ~ approximate |
    19→| `fabio:isRepresentationOf` | Item → Expression | has related expression of item | `rdai:P40070` | ~ approximate |
    20→| `fabio:hasPortrayal` | Work → Item | has related item of work | `rdaw:P10310` | ~ approximate |
    21→| `fabio:isPortrayalOf` | Item → Work | has related work of item | `rdai:P40069` | ~ approximate |
    22→| `fabio:hasDepositDate` | Item → xsd:dateTime | has custodial history of item | `rdai:P40026` | ~ partial |
    23→| `fabio:hasAccessDate` | Item → xsd:dateTime | has note on item | `rdai:P40028` | ✗ no direct match |
    24→| `fabio:isStoredOn` | Item → StorageMedium | has carrier type / has media type | `rdam:P30001` / `rdam:P30002` | ✗ level mismatch |
    25→| `fabio:stores` | StorageMedium → Item | *(none)* | — | ✗ no match |
    26→
    27→---
    28→
    29→## Property-by-property notes
    30→
    31→### `fabio:hasManifestation` → `rdaw:P10072`
    32→**Direct match.** RDA defines "has manifestation of work" (`rdaw:P10072`) with exactly the same semantics: *Relates a work to a manifestation that is a physical embodiment of a work.* FaBiO frames this as an FRBR shortcut (the standard FRBR path goes Work→Expression→Manifestation), but RDA explicitly provides this direct link.
    33→
    34→### `fabio:isManifestationOf` → `rdam:P30135`
    35→**Direct match (inverse direction).** RDA "has work manifested" (`rdam:P30135`): *Relates a manifestation to a work that is embodied by a manifestation.* This is the Manifestation-side inverse of `rdaw:P10072`.
    36→
    37→Note: RDA also offers `rdam:P30139` "has expression manifested" for the Manifestation→Expression direction, which is the intermediate step FaBiO skips.
    38→
    39→### `fabio:hasRepresentation` → `rdae:P20300`
    40→**Approximate match.** FaBiO links an Expression directly to an Item. RDA provides `rdae:P20300` "has related item of expression": *Relates an expression to an item that is associated with an expression.* The RDA definition is broader (any association) rather than specifically meaning "this expression is realized by this item." The standard RDA path is Expression→Manifestation (`rdae:P20059`) → Item (`rdam:P30xxx`). Use `rdae:P20300` where a direct shortcut is needed, but note it carries weaker semantics.
    41→
    42→### `fabio:isRepresentationOf` → `rdai:P40070`
    43→**Approximate match (inverse direction).** RDA "has related expression of item" (`rdai:P40070`): *Relates an item to an expression that is associated with an item.* Same caveat as above — the association is generic, not specifically "this item instantiates this expression." The canonical RDA direction is Item→Manifestation (`rdai:P40049`) → Expression (`rdam:P30139`).
    44→
    45→### `fabio:hasPortrayal` → `rdaw:P10310`
    46→**Approximate match.** FaBiO links a Work directly to an Item. RDA "has related item of work" (`rdaw:P10310`): *Relates a work to an item that is associated with a work.* Again, a generic association property covering a three-hop path (Work→Expression→Manifestation→Item). RDA does not provide a direct Work→Item realization property.
    47→
    48→### `fabio:isPortrayalOf` → `rdai:P40069`
    49→**Approximate match (inverse direction).** RDA "has related work of item" (`rdai:P40069`): *Relates an item to a work that is associated with an item.* Same level-of-specificity caveat.
    50→
    51→### `fabio:hasDepositDate` → `rdai:P40026` (partial)
    52→**Partial match.** FaBiO captures the date an item was deposited in a library/repository as a typed literal (`xsd:dateTime`). RDA "has custodial history of item" (`rdai:P40026`) is datatype-only (free text) and covers a broader history of ownership and custody — deposit date is one possible component of that string, not a structured field. Alternatively, `rdai:P40050` "has immediate source of acquisition of item" mentions date of acquisition in its definition but is also free text. Neither RDA property is a structural equivalent; deposit date would need to be recorded as a substring within one of these notes.
    53→
    54→### `fabio:hasAccessDate` → *(no direct match)*
    55→**No direct match.** RDA has no property for "date on which a digital item was accessed." This concept belongs to citation metadata (e.g., `dcterms:accessed`) rather than bibliographic description. Closest fallback is `rdai:P40028` "has note on item" (free text). Outside RDA, `dcterms:date` or `schema:dateAccessed` are more appropriate.
    56→
    57→### `fabio:isStoredOn` → `rdam:P30001` / `rdam:P30002` (level mismatch)
    58→**Level mismatch.** FaBiO attaches storage medium to an Item (`fabio:Item → fabio:StorageMedium`). In RDA, carrier and medium type are Manifestation-level properties: `rdam:P30001` "has carrier type" and `rdam:P30002` "has media type." Individual item-level carrier notes can go into `rdai:P40028` "has note on item," but RDA does not model a typed Item→medium relationship. If item-level carrier specifics matter (e.g., this copy is on a different medium than the typical manifestation), use the item note.
    59→
    60→### `fabio:stores` → *(no match)*



```

```
   346→            "subject properties to Works. RDA subject properties are also type-specific "
   347→            "(agent, concept, place, etc.)."
   348→        ),
   349→    },
   350→    {
   351→        "source_property": "fabio:hasPrimarySubjectTerm",
   352→        "rda_property": 'rdaw:P10256 "has subject"',
   353→        "domain": "frbr:Endeavour",
   354→        "range": "fabio:SubjectTerm",
   355→        "match": "approximate",
   356→        "remarks": "Sub-property of fabio:hasSubjectTerm; RDA makes no primary/secondary subject distinction.",
   357→    },
   358→    {
   359→        "source_property": "fabio:hasDiscipline",
   360→        "rda_property": "",
   361→        "domain": "frbr:Endeavour",
   362→        "range": "fabio:SubjectDiscipline",
   363→        "match": "no match",
   364→        "remarks": "Associates a resource or vocabulary to its intellectual discipline. No RDA equivalent.",
   365→    },
   366→    {
   367→        "source_property": "fabio:isDisciplineOf",
   368→        "rda_property": "",
   369→        "domain": "fabio:SubjectDiscipline",
   370→        "range": "frbr:Endeavour",
   371→        "match": "no match",
   372→        "remarks": "Inverse of fabio:hasDiscipline. No RDA equivalent.",
   373→    },
   374→]
   375→
   376→
   377→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   378→# Helpers
   379→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   380→
   381→def rda_property_list(cell: str) -> list[str]:
   382→    """Split a semicolon-separated rda_property cell into a list of strings."""
   383→    if not cell:
   384→        return []
   385→    return [s.strip() for s in cell.split(";") if s.strip()]
   386→
   387→
   388→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   389→# Main
   390→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   391→
   392→def main():
   393→    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description=__doc__)
   394→    parser.add_argument("--out-csv",  default="output/frbr-fabio-nonwemi-to-rda.csv")
   395→    parser.add_argument("--out-json", default="output/frbr-fabio-nonwemi-to-rda.json")
   396→    args = parser.parse_args()
   397→
   398→    out_csv  = Path(args.out_csv)
   399→    out_json = Path(args.out_json)
   400→    out_csv.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   401→
   402→    fieldnames = ["source_property", "rda_property", "domain", "range", "match", "remarks"]
   403→
   404→    # CSV
   405→    with open(out_csv, "w", newline="", encoding="utf-8") as f:
   406→        writer = csv.DictWriter(f, fieldnames=fieldnames)
   407→        writer.writeheader()
   408→        writer.writerows(ROWS)
   409→    print(f"Wrote {len(ROWS)} rows → {out_csv}")
   410→
   411→    # JSON  (rda_property as list)
   412→    json_rows = []
   413→    for row in ROWS:
   414→        jr = dict(row)
   415→        jr["rda_property"] = rda_property_list(row["rda_property"])
   416→        json_rows.append(jr)
   417→
   418→    with open(out_json, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
   419→        json.dump(json_rows, f, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)
   420→    print(f"Wrote {len(json_rows)} rows → {out_json}")
   421→
   422→    # Summary
   423→    from collections import Counter
   424→    counts = Counter(r["match"] for r in ROWS)
   425→    for match, n in sorted(counts.items()):
   426→        print(f"  {match}: {n}")
   427→
   428→
   429→if __name__ == "__main__":
   430→    main()
   431→



```

```
    60→### `fabio:stores` → *(no match)*
    61→**No match.** This is the inverse of `fabio:isStoredOn` (StorageMedium → Item). RDA has no StorageMedium class and no inverse carrier-to-item property.
    62→
    63→---
    64→
    65→## Cross-WEMI shortcut properties: structural note
    66→
    67→FaBiO introduces six cross-WEMI shortcuts that bypass one or two levels of the FRBR stack:
    68→
    69→| FaBiO shortcut | Levels skipped | Standard RDA path |
    70→|---|---|---|
    71→| Work → Manifestation | Expression | `rdaw:P10072` ← RDA provides this directly |
    72→| Manifestation → Work | Expression | `rdam:P30135` ← RDA provides this directly |
    73→| Expression → Item | Manifestation | `rdae:P20059` + `rdam:P30xxx` (two hops) |
    74→| Item → Expression | Manifestation | `rdai:P40049` + `rdam:P30139` (two hops) |
    75→| Work → Item | Expression + Manifestation | three hops |
    76→| Item → Work | Expression + Manifestation | three hops |
    77→
    78→RDA absorbed the two-level shortcut (Work↔Manifestation) but not the three-level ones or the Expression↔Item shortcuts. The "has related X of Y" properties in RDA cover those cases but with generic "associated with" semantics rather than a formal realization/embodiment claim.
    79→
    80→---
    81→
    82→## FRBR Core → RDA mapping
    83→
    84→FRBR Core (`http://purl.org/vocab/frbr/core#`) defines the canonical WEMI chain plus a set of expression-level derivation relationships. 39 properties are mapped below.
    85→
    86→### Summary table
    87→
    88→#### Structural chain (WEMI ladder)
    89→
    90→| FRBR property | Domain → Range | RDA equivalent | RDA ID | Match |
    91→|---|---|---|---|---|
    92→| `frbr:realization` | Work → Expression | has expression of work | `rdaw:P10078` | ✓ direct |
    93→| `frbr:realizationOf` | Expression → Work | has work expressed | `rdae:P20231` | ✓ direct |
    94→| `frbr:embodiment` | Expression → Manifestation | has manifestation of expression | `rdae:P20059` | ✓ direct |
    95→| `frbr:embodimentOf` | Manifestation → Expression | has expression manifested | `rdam:P30139` | ✓ direct |
    96→| `frbr:exemplar` | Manifestation → Item | has exemplar of manifestation | `rdam:P30103` | ✓ direct |
    97→| `frbr:exemplarOf` | Item → Manifestation | has manifestation exemplified | `rdai:P40049` | ✓ direct |
    98→
    99→#### Partonomy
   100→
   101→| FRBR property | Domain → Range | RDA equivalent | RDA ID | Match |
   102→|---|---|---|---|---|
   103→| `frbr:part` | Endeavour → Endeavour (typed) | has part work / expression / manifestation / item | `rdaw:P10147` / `rdae:P20145` / (rdam) / (rdai) | ~ approximate (entity-typed in RDA) |
   104→| `frbr:partOf` | Endeavour → Endeavour (typed) | is part of work / expression / manifestation / item | `rdaw:P10019` / `rdae:P20074` / (rdam) / (rdai) | ~ approximate |
   105→
   106→#### Agent roles
   107→
   108→| FRBR property | Domain → Range | RDA equivalent | RDA ID | Match |
   109→|---|---|---|---|---|
   110→| `frbr:creator` | Work → ResponsibleEntity | has creator agent of work | `rdaw:P10065` | ✓ direct |
   111→| `frbr:realizer` | Expression → ResponsibleEntity | has creator agent of expression | `rdae:P20053` | ~ approximate (RDA splits by role) |
   112→| `frbr:producer` | Manifestation → ResponsibleEntity | has producer agent of unpublished manifestation | `rdam:P30081` | ~ approximate (RDA splits by role) |
   113→| `frbr:owner` | Item → ResponsibleEntity | has owner agent | `rdai:P40021` | ✓ direct |
   114→
   115→#### Work subject
   116→
   117→| FRBR property | Domain → Range | RDA equivalent | RDA ID | Match |
   118→|---|---|---|---|---|
   119→| `frbr:subject` | Work → Subject∪Endeavour∪CorporateBody | has subject | `rdaw:P10256` | ~ approximate (RDA has typed sub-properties) |
   120→
   121→#### Expression derivation relationships
   122→
   123→| FRBR property | Domain → Range | RDA equivalent | RDA ID | Match |
   124→|---|---|---|---|---|
   125→| `frbr:abridgement` | Expression → Expression | is abridged as expression | `rdae:P20166` | ✓ direct |
   126→| `frbr:abridgementOf` | Expression → Expression | is abridgement of expression | `rdae:P20121` | ✓ direct |
   127→| `frbr:arrangement` | Expression → Expression | is arranged as | `rdae:P20165` | ✓ direct |
   128→| `frbr:arrangementOf` | Expression → Expression | is arrangement of | `rdae:P20139` | ✓ direct |
   129→| `frbr:revision` | Expression → Expression | is revised as | `rdae:P20211` | ✓ direct |
   130→| `frbr:revisionOf` | Expression → Expression | is revision of | `rdae:P20189` | ✓ direct |
   131→| `frbr:translation` | Expression → Expression | is translated as | `rdae:P20171` | ✓ direct |

   133→
   134→#### Work/Expression derivation relationships (union domain/range)
   135→
   136→RDA handles these at both Work and Expression level with separate typed properties. FRBR uses a single property with a union domain/range.
   137→
   138→| FRBR property | Domain → Range | RDA Work equivalent | RDA Expression equivalent | Match |
   139→|---|---|---|---|---|
   140→| `frbr:adaption` | Work∪Expr → Work∪Expr | is adapted as work (`rdaw:P10155`) / is adaptation of work (`rdaw:P10142`) | is adapted as expression (`rdae:P20153`) / is adaptation of expression (`rdae:P20152`) | ✓ direct (split by entity) |
   141→| `frbr:adaptionOf` | Work∪Expr → Work∪Expr | (inverse of above) | (inverse of above) | ✓ direct |
   142→| `frbr:complement` | Work∪Expr → Work∪Expr | is complemented by work (`rdaw:P10103`) | is complemented by expression (`rdae:P20100`) | ✓ direct (split) |
   143→| `frbr:complementOf` | Work∪Expr → Work∪Expr | (inverse) | (inverse) | ✓ direct |
   144→| `frbr:imitation` | Work∪Expr → Work∪Expr | is imitated as work (see note) | is imitated as expression (`rdae:P20114`) | ~ partial (Work inverse absent) |
   145→| `frbr:imitationOf` | Work∪Expr → Work∪Expr | is imitation of work (`rdaw:P10196`) | is imitation of expression (`rdae:P20195`) | ✓ direct (split) |
   146→| `frbr:summarization` | Work∪Expr → Work∪Expr | *(no current Work equivalent)* | is summarized as expression (`rdae:P20106`, deprecated) | ~ partial / deprecated |
   147→| `frbr:summarizationOf` | Work∪Expr → Work∪Expr | *(no current Work equivalent)* | is summary of expression (`rdae:P20179`, deprecated) | ~ partial / deprecated |
   148→| `frbr:supplement` | Work∪Expr → Work∪Expr | has supplement work (`rdaw:P10172`) / is supplement to work (`rdaw:P10154`) | has supplement expression (`rdae:P20172`) / is supplement to expression (`rdae:P20151`) | ✓ direct (split) |
   149→| `frbr:supplementOf` | Work∪Expr → Work∪Expr | (inverse) | (inverse) | ✓ direct |
   150→| `frbr:successor` | Work∪Expr → Work∪Expr | has sequel work (`rdaw:P10020`) / is preceded by work (`rdaw:P10156`) / is succeeded by work (`rdaw:P10170`) | has sequel expression (`rdae:P20335`) / is preceded by expression (`rdae:P20154`) / is succeeded by expression (`rdae:P20169`) | ✓ direct (split; RDA also has prequel/sequel) |
   151→| `frbr:successorOf` | Work∪Expr → Work∪Expr | has prequel work (`rdaw:P10122`) | has prequel expression (`rdae:P20334`) | ✓ direct |
   152→| `frbr:transformation` | Work∪Expr → Work∪Expr | is transformation of (`rdaw:P10337`) | *(no current Expression equivalent)* | ~ partial (Work only) |
   153→| `frbr:transformationOf` | Work∪Expr → Work∪Expr | (inverse of above) | *(no current Expression equivalent)* | ~ partial |
   154→
   155→#### Manifestation relationships
   156→
   157→| FRBR property | Domain → Range | RDA equivalent | RDA ID | Match |
   158→|---|---|---|---|---|
   159→| `frbr:alternate` | Manifestation → Manifestation | *(none)* | — | ✗ no match |
   160→| `frbr:alternateOf` | Manifestation → Manifestation | *(none)* | — | ✗ no match |
   161→| `frbr:reproduction` | Manifestation∪Item → Manifestation∪Item | has electronic reproduction / has facsimile / has digital transfer (manifestation); has digital transfer of item / has electronic reproduction of item (item) | `rdam:P30016`, `rdam:P30031`, `rdam:P30029`; `rdai:P40087`–`rdai:P40092` | ~ approximate (RDA distinguishes reproduction type) |
   162→| `frbr:reproductionOf` | Manifestation∪Item → Manifestation∪Item | is reproduction of manifestation of (`rdam:P30043`) / is electronic reproduction of item of (`rdai:P40088`) | `rdam:P30043`; `rdai:P40088` | ~ approximate |
   163→
   164→#### Item relationships
   165→
   166→| FRBR property | Domain → Range | RDA equivalent | RDA ID | Match |
   167→|---|---|---|---|---|
   168→| `frbr:reconfiguration` | Item → Item | *(none)* | — | ✗ no match |
   169→| `frbr:reconfigurationOf` | Item → Item | *(none)* | — | ✗ no match |
   170→
   171→#### Top / generic properties
   172→
   173→| FRBR property | Notes |
   174→|---|---|
   175→| `frbr:relatedEndeavour` | Top-level super-property for all FRBR relationships. No RDA equivalent — RDA uses typed properties throughout with no common super-property. |
   176→| `frbr:responsibleEntity` | Generic agent link. RDA replaces this with typed role properties at each WEMI level. |
   177→| `frbr:responsibleEntityOf` | Inverse of above. Same note. |
   178→
   179→---
   180→
   181→### Property-by-property notes (FRBR)
   182→
   183→**`frbr:realization` / `frbr:realizationOf`** — The canonical Work↔Expression link. `rdaw:P10078` "has expression of work" and `rdae:P20231` "has work expressed" are direct equivalents. Note: `frbr:realizationOf` is declared a `owl:FunctionalProperty` in FRBR (each expression realizes exactly one work); RDA does not assert this constraint.
   184→
   185→**`frbr:embodiment` / `frbr:embodimentOf`** — The Expression↔Manifestation link. `rdae:P20059` and `rdam:P30139` are direct matches.
   186→
   187→**`frbr:exemplar` / `frbr:exemplarOf`** — The Manifestation↔Item link. `rdam:P30103` "has exemplar of manifestation" and `rdai:P40049` "has manifestation exemplified" are direct matches. `frbr:exemplarOf` is also declared `owl:FunctionalProperty` in FRBR; RDA does not assert this.
   188→
   189→**`frbr:part` / `frbr:partOf`** — FRBR Core defines these as `owl:TransitiveProperty` with the constraint that parts are typed to the same WEMI level (Work parts are Works, etc.). RDA provides entity-specific properties (`rdaw:P10147` "has part work", `rdae:P20145` "has part expression", etc.) but does not assert transitivity. Approximate match.
   190→
   191→**`frbr:realizer`** — A generic "agent responsible for this expression." RDA splits this into many typed contributor roles (`rdae:P20053` "has creator agent of expression" being the closest generic equivalent). The FRBR property collapses translator, arranger, performer, etc. into one; RDA treats these as distinct properties.
   192→
   193→**`frbr:producer`** — A generic "agent responsible for this manifestation." RDA provides `rdam:P30081` "has producer agent of unpublished manifestation" for unpublished items, and `rdam:P30329` "has creator agent of manifestation" for published ones. Neither is an exact one-to-one equivalent.
   194→
   195→**`frbr:alternate`** — No RDA equivalent. The FRBR alternate relationship (manifestations that serve as substitutes for each other, e.g., different format editions) is not modeled as a first-class property in RDA. The closest available property is `rdam:P30035` "is on carrier unit with," which has different semantics (physical co-location on the same carrier unit).
   196→
   197→**`frbr:reproduction`** — FRBR uses one property for all reproduction types across both Manifestation and Item. RDA provides a family of specific properties distinguishing electronic reproduction, facsimile, digital transfer, preservation facsimile, and reprint — separately at Manifestation and Item levels. Approximate match via the relevant RDA sub-property.
   198→
   199→**`frbr:reconfiguration` / `frbr:reconfigurationOf`** — No RDA equivalent. FRBR defines this as binding two items together to produce a new item. RDA's `rdai:P40032` "is bound with" describes co-location of items in the same binding but does not model the production of a new item from reconfiguration.
   200→
   201→**`frbr:summarization` / `frbr:summarizationOf`** — The RDA Expression equivalents (`rdae:P20106`, `rdae:P20179`) are deprecated in 5.4.9. No current Work-level equivalent exists. This relationship is now expected to be handled as an adaptation or transformation in RDA.
   202→
   203→**`frbr:transformation`** — RDA provides `rdaw:P10337` "is transformation of" at the Work level (and related typed sub-properties `P10341`–`P10384` for transformation by style, genre, policy, etc.). No current Expression-level equivalent exists in RDA 5.4.9.
   204→
```

```
    16→frbr:exemplar,rdam:P30103 "has exemplar of manifestation",Manifestation,Item,direct,Canonical Manifestation→Item link
    17→frbr:exemplarOf,rdai:P40049 "has manifestation exemplified",Item,Manifestation,direct,frbr:exemplarOf is owl:FunctionalProperty; RDA does not assert this constraint
    18→frbr:part,"rdaw:P10147 ""has part work""; rdae:P20145 ""has part expression""",Work|Expression|Manifestation|Item,Work|Expression|Manifestation|Item,approximate,FRBR uses one transitive property typed to the same WEMI level; RDA provides entity-specific non-transitive properties
    19→frbr:partOf,"rdaw:P10019 ""is part of work""; rdae:P20074 ""is part of expression""",Work|Expression|Manifestation|Item,Work|Expression|Manifestation|Item,approximate,Inverse of frbr:part; same structural mismatch with RDA

    21→frbr:realizer,rdae:P20053 "has creator agent of expression",Expression,Agent,approximate,FRBR collapses all expression-level agent roles into one property; RDA uses typed role properties
    22→frbr:producer,rdam:P30081 "has producer agent of unpublished manifestation",Manifestation,Agent,approximate,RDA splits by published/unpublished status and by agent role type; no single equivalent
    23→frbr:owner,rdai:P40021 "has owner agent",Item,Agent,direct,
    24→frbr:subject,rdaw:P10256 "has subject",Work,Subject,approximate,RDA provides typed sub-properties: subject work; subject expression; subject manifestation; subject item
    25→frbr:abridgement,rdae:P20166 "is abridged as expression",Expression,Expression,direct,
    26→frbr:abridgementOf,rdae:P20121 "is abridgement of expression",Expression,Expression,direct,
    27→frbr:arrangement,rdae:P20165 "is arranged as",Expression,Expression,direct,
    28→frbr:arrangementOf,rdae:P20139 "is arrangement of",Expression,Expression,direct,
    29→frbr:revision,rdae:P20211 "is revised as",Expression,Expression,direct,
    30→frbr:revisionOf,rdae:P20189 "is revision of",Expression,Expression,direct,

    32→frbr:translationOf,rdae:P20141 "is translation of",Expression,Expression,direct,

    34→frbr:adaptionOf,"rdaw:P10142 ""is adaptation of work""; rdae:P20152 ""is adaptation of expression""",Work|Expression,Work|Expression,direct,Inverse of frbr:adaption
    35→frbr:complement,"rdaw:P10103 ""is complemented by work""; rdae:P20100 ""is complemented by expression""",Work|Expression,Work|Expression,direct,RDA splits by entity type
```

### Assistant *(2026-02-25T17:32:36.156Z)*

The approximate matches were decided using four criteria. I'll define them explicitly and add them to both docs, then tag each approximate-match row in the CSV/JSON.

**Criteria derived from the existing mappings:**
- **A** — Granularity split: source collapses what RDA separates into multiple role- or type-specific properties
- **B** — Semantic narrowing: no dedicated equivalent; best available is broader, weaker, or lacks the inverse
- **C** — Domain/scope mismatch: source applies to a wider domain than the RDA property allows
- **D** — Level-skip / semantic weakening: source crosses WEMI levels in one step; RDA requires multi-hop or provides only a generic "related X of Y" association

Starting with the non-WEMI mapping doc:

---

### Assistant *(2026-02-25T17:32:48.359Z)*

**Tool call:** `Edit`
```json
{
  "replace_all": false,
  "file_path": "/Users/mta/Documents/claude/mocho/docs/frbr-fabio-nonwemi-rda-mapping.md",
  "old_string": "RDA classes use the `rdac:` prefix (`https://rdaregistry.info/Elements/c/`).\nRDA Agent properties use `rdaa:` (`https://rdaregistry.info/Elements/a/`).\nRDA W/E/M/I properties use `rdaw:/rdae:/rdam:/rdai:` as usual.\n\n---\n\n## 1. Class Mappings",
  "new_string": "RDA classes use the `rdac:` prefix (`https://rdaregistry.info/Elements/c/`).\nRDA Agent properties use `rdaa:` (`https://rdaregistry.info/Elements/a/`).\nRDA W/E/M/I properties use `rdaw:/rdae:/rdam:/rdai:` as usual.\n\n---\n\n## Match Quality Criteria\n\nEach mapping carries one of three match levels: **direct**, **approximate**, or **no match**.\n\n- **direct** — Same semantics, domain, and range. Minor label or structural differences (e.g. available sub-properties in RDA) do not affect the core meaning.\n- **approximate** — Best available mapping but deviates in one or more of the ways described below.\n- **no match** — No RDA class or property covers the source concept. Asserting equivalence with an adjacent RDA term would be misleading.\n\nWhere the match is **approximate**, the remarks field identifies which criterion applies:\n\n| Code | Criterion | Description |\n|---|---|---|\n| A | Granularity split | The source uses a single undifferentiated property where RDA provides a set of finer-grained, role- or type-specific properties. No single RDA property covers the full extension of the source. |\n| B | Semantic narrowing | No dedicated RDA equivalent exists; the best available property has broader, weaker, or directionally different semantics (e.g. a generic super-property where a specific sub-property is needed). |\n| C | Domain/scope mismatch | The source applies to a broader domain (e.g., any `frbr:Endeavour`) while the RDA equivalent is scoped to a narrower entity level (e.g., Work only). The mapping holds for the intersection but is incomplete for the remainder. |\n| D | Level-skip / semantic weakening | The source crosses WEMI levels in a single step; RDA requires a multi-hop path or provides only a generic \"related X of Y\" property without the source's specific realization or embodiment semantics. |\n\n---\n\n## 1. Class Mappings"
}
```

---

### Assistant *(2026-02-25T17:33:23.796Z)*

**Tool call:** `Edit`
```json
{
  "replace_all": false,
  "file_path": "/Users/mta/Documents/claude/mocho/docs/fabio-wemi-rda-mapping.md",
  "old_string": "**Sources**\n- FRBR frbr: `ontology/frbr.ttl` (Essential FRBR in OWL2 DL, `http://purl.org/vocab/frbr/core#`)\n- FaBiO: `ontology/fabio.owl`\n- RDA 5.4.9: `ontology/RDA-Vocabularies-5.4.9/xml/Elements/{w,e,m,i}/datatype.xml` and `object.xml`\n\n---\n\n## Summary table",
  "new_string": "**Sources**\n- FRBR frbr: `ontology/frbr.ttl` (Essential FRBR in OWL2 DL, `http://purl.org/vocab/frbr/core#`)\n- FaBiO: `ontology/fabio.owl`\n- RDA 5.4.9: `ontology/RDA-Vocabularies-5.4.9/xml/Elements/{w,e,m,i}/datatype.xml` and `object.xml`\n\n---\n\n## Match Quality Criteria\n\nEach row carries one of the following match levels:\n\n- **direct** — Same semantics, domain, and range. Minor label differences, OWL axioms (e.g. `owl:FunctionalProperty`), or available sub-properties do not affect the core meaning.\n- **approximate** — Best available mapping but deviates in one or more of the ways described below.\n- **partial** — An RDA property covers part of the source's semantics, but coverage is materially incomplete (e.g., limited to one entity level, missing the inverse direction, or deprecated in current RDA).\n- **level mismatch** — The RDA property operates at a different WEMI level than the source. May be used as a workaround but requires a change of entity level.\n- **no match** — No RDA class or property covers the source concept adequately.\n\nWhere the match is **approximate**, the remarks field identifies which criterion applies:\n\n| Code | Criterion | Description |\n|---|---|---|\n| A | Granularity split | The source uses a single undifferentiated property where RDA provides a set of finer-grained, role- or type-specific properties. No single RDA property covers the full extension of the source. |\n| B | Semantic narrowing | No dedicated RDA equivalent exists; the best available property has broader, weaker, or directionally different semantics (e.g. a generic super-property where a specific sub-property is needed, or a property that lacks a direct inverse). |\n| C | Domain/scope mismatch | The source applies to a broader domain (e.g., any Endeavour) while the RDA equivalent is scoped to a narrower entity level. The mapping holds for the intersection but is incomplete for the remainder. |\n| D | Level-skip / semantic weakening | The source crosses WEMI levels in a single step; RDA requires a multi-hop path or provides only a generic \"related X of Y\" property without the source's specific realization or embodiment semantics. |\n\n---\n\n## Summary table"
}
```

### Assistant *(2026-02-25T17:37:59.569Z)*

**Tool call:** `Bash`
```json
{
  "command": "python3 - <<'EOF'\nimport csv, json\nfrom pathlib import Path\n\ncsv_path = Path(\"output/frbr-fabio-to-rda.csv\")\njson_path = Path(\"output/frbr-fabio-to-rda.json\")\n\nrows = []\nwith open(csv_path, newline=\"\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\n    for row in csv.DictReader(f):\n        jr = dict(row)\n        # split rda_property on semicolons, strip, drop empties\n        cell = jr[\"rda_property\"]\n        if cell and cell != \"—\":\n            jr[\"rda_property\"] = [s.strip() for s in cell.split(\";\") if s.strip()]\n        else:\n            jr[\"rda_property\"] = []\n        rows.append(jr)\n\nwith open(json_path, \"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\n    json.dump(rows, f, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)\n\nprint(f\"Wrote {len(rows)} rows → {json_path}\")\n\nfrom collections import Counter\ncounts = Counter(r[\"match\"] for r in rows)\nfor k, v in sorted(counts.items()):\n    print(f\"  {k}: {v}\")\nEOF",
  "description": "Regenerate WEMI JSON from updated CSV"
}
```

```json
  "file_path": "/Users/mta/Documents/claude/mocho/scripts/csv_to_json.py",
  "content": "\"\"\"\ncsv_to_json.py\n\nConvert a mapping CSV (source_property, rda_property, domain, range, match, remarks)\nto its JSON equivalent. The rda_property cell is split on semicolons into a list.\n\nUsage:\n  python scripts/csv_to_json.py <input.csv> [<output.json>]\n\nIf output path is omitted, the JSON is written alongside the CSV with the same stem.\n\nInputs:\n  input.csv   — mapping CSV with columns: source_property, rda_property, domain,\n                range, match, remarks\n\nOutputs:\n  output.json — JSON array; rda_property is a list of strings split on \";\"\n\"\"\"\n\nimport argparse\nimport csv\nimport json\nfrom pathlib import Path\n\n\nEMPTY_CELL_VALUES = {\"\", \"—\"}\n\n\ndef rda_property_list(cell: str) -> list[str]:\n    if cell in EMPTY_CELL_VALUES:\n        return []\n    return [s.strip() for s in cell.split(\";\") if s.strip()]\n\n\ndef convert(csv_path: Path, json_path: Path) -> int:\n    rows = []\n    with open(csv_path, newline=\"\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\n        for row in csv.DictReader(f):\n            jr = dict(row)\n            jr[\"rda_property\"] = rda_property_list(jr.get(\"rda_property\", \"\"))\n            rows.append(jr)\n\n    with open(json_path, \"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\n        json.dump(rows, f, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)\n\n    return len(rows)\n\n\ndef main():\n    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description=__doc__)\n    parser.add_argument(\"csv\", type=Path, help=\"Input CSV file\")\n    parser.add_argument(\"json\", nargs=\"?\", type=Path, help=\"Output JSON file (default: same stem as CSV)\")\n    args = parser.parse_args()\n\n    csv_path = args.csv\n    json_path = args.json or csv_path.with_suffix(\".json\")\n\n    n = convert(csv_path, json_path)\n    print(f\"Wrote {n} rows → {json_path}\")\n\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    main()\n"
}
```
